---
title: "Actuarial Projects Portfolio"
---

I am building a portfolio of projects related to actuarial science, quantitative methods, and computational modelling. The repository combines academic work with coding-based analyses, including simulation, statistical methods, and financial modelling.

## Selected Projects

### [How past negative returns impact future volatility? Leverage Effect: WSE vs NYSE](projects/leverage_effect.qmd)

### [Modeling Stock Returns with Maximum Likelihood Estimation](projects/financial_mathematics/normal_vs_mixture/normal_vs_mixture.qmd)

## 
To build this website I used Quarto and GitHub Pages.
